name: Engaged Last-Minute Learners
interpretation: High VLE use near deadlines; many still pass. Pass 68%, Fail+Withdrawn 15%.
intervention: Optional time-management nudges; not default at-risk by cluster alone.

name: Struggling Students
interpretation: Very high missing work; engagement drops over time. Fail+Withdrawn 98%.

name: Disengaged / Withdrawn
intervention: Early-week zero-activity alerts; welfare pathways weeks 1–3.
